They can be set up in the "},{"text":"Shipping","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"Other shipping setup","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"Carriers & Labels","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where image colours were changing when processed through the imagedrop folder."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
